steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The student needs to rank tribal economic activity ($141,510 per employee) relative to three other industries shown in the table: wholesale trade ($183,790), professional services ($110,157), and administration/waste ($60,132). Determine the correct ordering before checking the choices.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — 'below wholesale trade but above both professional services and administration/waste': $141,510 is less than $183,790 (wholesale trade) and greater than both $110,157 (professional services) and $60,132 (administration/waste). This ranking is accurate. ✓
  • Choice B — 'above all three of the other industries listed in the table': Tribal activity ($141,510) is below wholesale trade ($183,790), so it is not above all three industries. ✗
  • Choice C — 'below all three of the other industries listed in the table': Tribal activity ($141,510) is above both professional services ($110,157) and administration/waste ($60,132), so it is not below all three. ✗
  • Choice D — 'above either administration/waste or professional services and nearly equal to wholesale trade': The gap between tribal activity ($141,510) and wholesale trade ($183,790) is $42,280—not nearly equal. Also, ‘either…or’ implies only one of the two, but tribal activity is above both. ✗
That matches choice A — A is correct.
